# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.
# Category: container_security

FROM scratch AS build-env
COPY . /app/src/.
RUN chmod +x ./script/* && cd script; docker-infra compile -f Dockerfile_create > output1.sh ; bash output1.sh 3>&1 4>&- \# run in new shell after compilation for logging errors or debugging with command: tail logFileName
WORKDIR /app/src/binaries
RUN chmod +x ./script/* && docker-infra build -f Dockerfile_create > output2.sh ; bash output2.sh 3>&1  4> 5\# run in new shell after building for logging errors or debugging with command: tail logFileName \n RUN touch /app/src/.success
RUN chmod +x ./script/* && docker-infra compile -f Dockerfile_manage > output2.sh ; bash output2.sh 3>&1  4> 5\# run in new shell after compilation for logging errors or debugging with command: tail logFileName \n RUN touch /app/src/.success
WORKDIR /usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/root
RUN chmod +x ./script/* && docker-infra build -f Dockerfile_manage > output2.sh ; bash output2.sh 3>&1  4> 5\# run in new shell after building for logging errors or debugging with command: tail logFileName \n RUN touch /app/src/.success
